title: Arrow Switcher
description: Arrow Switcher is the ultimate Minecraft mod for swapping out arrows on the fly with just the press of a button!
body:
Arrow Switcher lets you cycle through all your arrow types with a single keybind. A clean HUD overlay shows your previous, current, and next arrow, so you always know what you're about to shoot.


**How to use:**

- Have multiple arrow types in your inventory
- Hold a bow or crossbow (or don't, works either way lol)
- Press V / B to cycle (can be changed in Key Binds menu of minecraft)
- The HUD pops up showing your selection, and the mod swaps the arrow to the front of your inventory
- Shoot! Minecraft uses whichever arrow is in the lowest slot

**Configuration**

- Access via Mod Menu → Arrow Switcher → Config or edit config/arrow-switcher.json directly.

**Contact:**

Discord: @foksha
